name: Denmark Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald lard and sugar with water until cool.
2. Add 2 beaten eggs, dissolved yeast cake in lukewarm water to the mixture of lard and sugar.
3. Gradually add enough flour to form a stiff dough.
4. Allow the dough to rise for 5 or 6 hours.
5. Punch down the dough and place it in the icebox.
6. These rolls will keep for up to 10 days and can be made as needed.
